title: awkward
summary:
Manipulate JSON-like data with NumPy-like idioms. 
 !docs-imglogologo-300px.png Awkward Array is a library for nested, variable-sized data, including arbitrary-length lists, records, mixed types, and missing data, using NumPy-like idioms. Arrays are dynamically typed, but operations on them are compiled and fast. Their behavior coincides with NumPy when array dimensions are regular and generalizes when they're not.
